description_long: This stone is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized rock with a rugged, natural appearance. Its surface is predominantly gray with patches of white, featuring a mix of smooth and rough textures, and several rounded protrusions and indentations. The top and bottom faces are relatively flat, while the sides are more uneven and pitted, suggesting a history of weathering and exposure to the elements. The stone appears to be composed mainly of sedimentary material, possibly conglomerate, with embedded lighter stones or pebbles visible on its surface. The coloration and texture indicate it could have been sourced from a riverbed or used as a landscaping or barrier stone in an urban park or sidewalk. Its substantial mass and solid build make it suitable as an obstacle or boundary marker in public spaces.
description: A rugged, gray stone with white patches and a mix of smooth and rough surfaces, featuring embedded pebbles and irregular contours. Its natural, weathered look makes it suitable as an urban barrier or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's rounded, pitted side with prominent white patches and embedded pebbles.
description_view_1: The top face appears relatively flat and smooth, with a uniform gray color and minimal surface features.
description_view_2: Another flat face is visible, showing a slightly angled surface with a consistent gray tone and subtle edge irregularities.
description_view_3: This side reveals a more elongated profile, with a pronounced division between the gray base and the white, pebble-studded upper section.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or boundary marker on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling with embedded white pebbles and patches, no regular or artificial patterning
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with visible signs of natural weathering, some smooth areas from abrasion
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or landscaped greenery, providing a subtle contrast to paved surfaces
